2603.20930.title: Causally-Guided Diffusion for Stable Feature Selection
2603.20930.paper_summary: Feature selection is fundamental to robust data-centric AI, but most existing methods optimize predictive performance under a single data distribution. This often selects spurious features that fail under distribution shifts. Motivated by principles from causal invariance, we study feature selection from a stability perspective and introduce Causally-Guided Diffusion for Stable Feature Selection (CGDFS). In CGDFS, we formalized feature selection as approximate posterior inference over feature subsets, whose posterior mass favors low prediction error and low cross-environment variance. Our framework combines three key insights: First, we formulate feature selection as stability-aware posterior sampling. Here, causal invariance serves as a soft inductive bias rather than explicit causal discovery. Second, we train a diffusion model as a learned prior over plausible continuous selection masks, combined with a stability-aware likelihood that rewards invariance across environments. This diffusion prior captures structural dependencies among features and enables scalable exploration of the combinatorially large selection space. Third, we perform guided annealed Langevin sampling that combines the diffusion prior with the stability objective, which yields a tractable, uncertainty-aware posterior inference that avoids discrete optimization and produces robust feature selections. We evaluate CGDFS on open-source real-world datasets exhibiting distribution shifts. Across both classification and regression tasks, CGDFS consistently selects more stable and transferable feature subsets, which leads to improved out-of-distribution performance and greater selection robustness compared to sparsity-based, tree-based, and stability-selection baselines.
2603.20930.paper_summary_zh: 特徵選擇對於穩健的數據中心 AI 是根本性的，但大多數現有方法僅在單一數據分佈下優化預測性能。這通常會選擇在分佈變化下失效的虛假特徵。受到因果不變性原則的啟發，我們從穩定性的角度研究特徵選擇，並引入了穩定特徵選擇的因果引導擴散 (CGDFS)。在 CGDFS 中，我們將特徵選擇形式化為對特徵子集的近似後驗推斷，其後驗質量偏向於低預測誤差和低跨環境方差。我們的框架結合了三個關鍵見解：首先，我們將特徵選擇表述為穩定性感知的後驗抽樣。在這裡，因果不變性作為一種軟性歸納偏見，而不是明確的因果發現。其次，我們訓練一個擴散模型作為可學習的先驗，針對合理的連續選擇掩碼，並結合穩定性感知的似然，該似然獎勵跨環境的不變性。這個擴散先驗捕捉了特徵之間的結構依賴性，並使得對組合性龐大的選擇空間進行可擴展的探索成為可能。第三，我們執行引導退火朗之萬抽樣，將擴散先驗與穩定性目標相結合，從而產生可處理的、不確定性感知的後驗推斷，避免了離散優化並產生穩健的特徵選擇。我們在展示分佈變化的開源真實世界數據集上評估 CGDFS。在分類和回歸任務中，CGDFS 一直選擇更穩定和可轉移的特徵子集，這導致了比基於稀疏性、基於樹和穩定性選擇基準更好的分佈外性能和更大的選擇穩健性。
2603.20930.author: Arun Vignesh Malarkkan et.al.
2603.20930.authors: Arun Vignesh Malarkkan, Xinyuan Wang, Kunpeng Liu, Denghui Zhang, Yanjie Fu
